# YOLO Run State

## Goal

> Build a simple to-do app using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript in a single HTML file with:
> 1. Create todo tasks
> 2. Mark them as done (grays out + strikethrough)
> 3. Show trash icon for completed tasks to delete permanently
> 4. Use browser localStorage
> 5. Responsive & intuitive with pleasing animations & gray tones

**Overall**: Complete
**Current Position**: All phases complete
